C:\Qt\Tools\CMake_64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\Hotel_Management.dir/objects.a
C:\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\Hotel_Management.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\Hotel_Management.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\Hotel_Management.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o Hotel_Management.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libHotel_Management.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\Hotel_Management.dir\linkLibs.rsp
